title: BEM-860 verify response
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:56 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
resp=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
txt=read(resp)
ok=resp.exists() and 'CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844' in txt and 'Decision:' in txt
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        try: data=json.loads(read(p))
        except Exception as exc: data={'status':'unparsed','error':str(exc),'text':read(p)[:500]}
        results.append({'path':str(p),'data':data})
queue=[str(p) for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json'))] if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').exists() else []
if ok:
    status='response_present_after_commit_path_fix'
    next_action='process response into agreed/BLOCKED protocol'
elif not results:
    status='still_no_dispatch_results_after_commit_path_fix'
    next_action='repair workflow dispatch queue processor/result writer'
elif not (runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')):
    status='still_no_runtime_after_commit_path_fix'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime state or dispatch target'
else:
    status='runtime_seen_response_still_missing_after_commit_path_fix'
    next_action='inspect dispatcher ensure step execution and response file generation'
state={'bem':'BEM-860','status':status,'response_exists':resp.exists(),'response_ok':ok,'response_preview':txt[:1600],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'dispatch_results_tail':results[-10:],'queue_remaining':queue[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem860_verify_response_after_commit_path_fix.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem860_verify_response_after_commit_path_fix.md').write_text('# BEM-860 | Verify Response After Commit Path Fix | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-860'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem860_verify_response_after_commit_path_fix.json','governance/reports/bem860_verify_response_after_commit_path_fix.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified BEM-844 response file after dispatcher commit path fix and retry tick')
"""
